mentions.note: Shipbuilder finished up 80% in 2025; fifth best among Industrials. Defense sector benefited from Pentagon budget increase talk.
Nation's sole nuclear aircraft carrier builder and one of two nuclear sub makers; up 80% in 2025; trades 24x earnings with 16% growth—reasonable valuation justified by 30-year Navy plan.
$16B military ship builder; one-stop-shop for Navy builds, rebuilds, overhauls; best Navy exposure; not expensive; long-term winner.
